hero.headline:
Technology Across
Every Domain.
hero.subheadline: Orabthic builds healthcare platforms, enterprise software, cloud infrastructure, and integration layers — a portfolio of technology engineered for organizations that demand precision, not promises.
pillars: Healthcare, operations, finance, and workforce technology
Industry-specific platforms on unified engineering foundations

manifesto.label: Technology Vision
manifesto.title: Infrastructure-grade technology, across industries.
paragraphs: Orabthic engineers software across healthcare, enterprise operations, workforce management, and digital commerce — each product governed by shared infrastructure principles: canonical data, atomic transactions, and immutable audit surfaces.

Event-driven architectures propagate state across domains. Clinical records connect to billing. POS transactions commit inventory and ledger entries. Payroll runs post to finance — one engineering discipline, many technology surfaces.

Built for regulated industries and complex jurisdictions. Multi-entity, multi-currency, and compliance-native by design — whether the domain is a hospital, a retail network, or a manufacturing operation.

principles.title: Canonical Data Layer
principles.desc: Unified schema. Single write path. Immutable audit trail across every operational domain.

principles.title: Synchronous Propagation
principles.desc: Sub-millisecond inter-module consistency. No batch jobs. No cross-department data lag.

principles.title: Jurisdiction-Native Core
principles.desc: Tax engines, Zakat computation, and multi-currency ledger primitives embedded at the architecture level.

principles.title: API-First Surface
principles.desc: OpenAPI-specified REST endpoints. Signed event webhooks. Integration as first-class infrastructure.

architecture.label: Engineering Domains
architecture.title: How we build across the stack.
architecture.description: From healthcare systems to enterprise operations — modular architecture, shared services, and infrastructure-grade reliability.

cta.title: Ready to receive your custom proposal?

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about enterprise engagement, pricing, and deployment — before your discovery call.
faq.sidebarText: Our enterprise team responds within one business day with answers tailored to your organization.

items.question: How is Orabthic priced?
items.answer: All pricing is provided on contact after a discovery consultation. Your proposal reflects the modules you deploy, user count, entity structure, deployment model, and integration requirements — never a one-size-fits-all tier.

items.question: Is there a minimum contract term?
items.answer: Standard enterprise contracts are annual. Multi-year agreements are available with additional support benefits and implementation priority.

items.question: Can we start with one module?
items.answer: Yes. Many organizations begin with Accounting or CRM and expand as operational needs grow. All modules share the same data layer from day one — no re-integration required when you add modules later.

items.question: Do you offer on-premise deployment?
items.answer: Yes. On-premise and private cloud options are available for organizations with specific data residency, air-gapped, or regulatory requirements. Deployment model is scoped during your consultation.

items.question: What does implementation include?
items.answer: Implementation covers platform configuration, data migration planning, user provisioning, integration setup, UAT support, and role-based training for administrators and end users.

items.question: How long does a typical implementation take?
items.answer: Timeline depends on module scope, entity count, and migration complexity. A single-module deployment may launch in weeks; multi-entity rollouts are phased over months. Your proposal includes a detailed timeline.

items.question: Do you migrate data from our existing systems?
items.answer: Yes. Our implementation team plans and executes data migration from spreadsheets, legacy ERPs, and point solutions. Migration scope and validation are defined during discovery.

items.question: What support is included after go-live?
items.answer: Every contract includes technical support, platform updates, and security patches. Enterprise engagements add dedicated account management, SLA-backed response times, and priority escalation.

items.question: Can Orabthic integrate with our existing tools?
items.answer: Yes. REST API, webhooks, and pre-built connectors cover common enterprise tools. Custom connector engineering is available for legacy systems and proprietary infrastructure.

items.question: When will Orabthic Health be available?
items.answer: Orabthic Health is in active development for hospitals, clinics, and health systems. Contact us to join the early access program and receive availability updates for your region.

items.question: What security and compliance standards do you meet?
items.answer: The platform is built with enterprise-grade security controls — encryption at rest and in transit, RBAC, and immutable audit trails across all deployments. We design for common compliance frameworks; formal certification and audit programs are scoped per engagement.

Enterprise software
